title: By Pike
writer: Vsevolod Kochetov, Oleg Leonidov, Ye. Tarakhova
actors: Pyotr Savin, Mariya Kravchunovskaya, Georgiy Millyar
plot: Adapted from four different Russian folk-tales, this early Soviet fantasy film tells the story of Emelya the Fool, who, fishing one day, catches a talking pike who pleads for his life and in return grants Emelya wishes for a life ...
